---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the use case or limitation you're running into.

**Proposed solution**
What would you like to see? Be as specific as you can about behavior.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you've thought about.

**Are you willing to contribute a PR?**
Yes / No / Maybe with guidance
